fieldValues.value: RFC-M: DocumentView query extensions — lifecycle-state exclusion and repository-wide type queries

Adds three optional fields to SectionSource.type-query: lifecycleStates (multi-value inclusion filter), excludeLifecycleStates (exclusion filter), and containerScope (explicit | repository | subtree). Enables the decision-log pattern: rendering all non-superseded/non-abandoned decisions across a repository without listing every container ID. Tracked in the-greenman/srs#41.
